current_task.title: Add runtime branch and SQL summary safety guards
current_task.description: Update the LangGraph runner so tasks with branch main are blocked or rewritten to feature/<task-id>, and fix summary parsing so SQL Required: no is parsed as false. Add tests or simple validation where appropriate. Do not modify app UI.
